## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Knowledge-base / playbook content
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`make test` or `pytest`)
- [ ] `ruff` is clean
- [ ] Added or updated tests for the change
- [ ] Updated relevant docs (README / `docs/` / CHANGELOG)
- [ ] New KB/framework content cites its source
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or personal/local paths in the diff
